title: March of 64: Bitsliced FSM Transition Synthesis
strategies: no-sharing per-domain-point minterm decoder, identity state numbering (trivial)
algebraic-normal-form (Reed-Muller) circuit compile, identity state numbering (greedy)
stochastic local search over state encodings to minimize ANF nonlinearity, then ANF-compile the winning encoding (strong)
true minimum-gate circuit under the true minimum-nonlinearity encoding is unknown / NP-hard to certify (open ceiling)
